case_title: LAW OFFICES OF GARY OBERST, P.C. vs. BRUNET, JACQUELINE

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICES OF GARY OBERST, P.C.
